zh.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: 英國素福爾可盧加姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Drury於大約1363年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Nicholas Drury25歲，母親Joan de Saxham24歲。他於大約1384年與Margery de Naunton在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年10月24日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可盧加姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Drury于大约1363年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Nicholas Drury25岁，母亲Joan de Saxham24岁。他于大约1384年与Margery de Naunton在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年10月24日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可盧加姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Drury was born about 1363, in Suffolk, England, his father, Nicholas Drury, was 25 and his mother, Joan de Saxham, was 24. He married Margery de Naunton about 1384, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 24 October 1420, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, England.

fr.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Drury est né environ 1363, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Drury, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan de Saxham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Naunton environ 1384, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1420, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Drury um 1363 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Drury 25 und seine Mutter Joan de Saxham 24. Er hat um 1384 in Suffolk, England Margery de Naunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1420 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Drury è nato il circa 1363 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Drury, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Saxham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margery de Naunton circa 1384, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1420, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Druryが約1363年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Nicholas Druryは25歳，母Joan de Saxhamは24歳であった。約1384年にイギリススフォルクでMargery de Nauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1420年10月24日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクロウアムスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 수폴크 루그함 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Drury(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Drury(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Saxham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1384년 영국 수폴크에서 Margery de Naunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 10월 24일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 루그함 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Drury nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Drury, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Saxham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Naunton aproximadamente 1384, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1420, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Engl: ст мэри'с чурч, роугам, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Drury родился около 1363 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Drury было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Saxham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Naunton около 1384 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 24 октября 1420 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, роугам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Drury nació aproximadamente 1363, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Drury, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan de Saxham, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margery de Naunton aproximadamente 1384, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1420, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
